hero.title: Three-panel Brand Creative Poster
hero.description: Create stunning three-panel brand creative posters with AI. This workflow generates split-screen advertising visuals that tell your brand story across multiple scenes—from product origin to customer experience. Perfect for social media ads, brand campaigns, and creative marketing.

steps.title: Input your brand story
steps.description: Describe your brand narrative across three scenes: origin story (top), brand interface (middle), and customer experience (bottom). Nano Banana Pro understands your creative vision.

steps.title: Generate brand logo
steps.description: AI creates a clean brand logo on white background that will be integrated into the social media interface section of your poster.

steps.title: Compose three-panel layout
steps.description: The workflow generates a cohesive three-panel poster: top scene shows product origin, middle displays social media UI with brand messaging, bottom features customer interaction.

steps.title: Export creative poster
steps.description: Download your complete three-panel brand poster ready for social media advertising, print campaigns, and digital marketing.

items.question: What is the Three-panel Brand Creative Poster workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow creates split-screen brand posters that tell your brand story across three connected scenes. It generates cohesive visuals showing product origin, brand messaging, and customer experience in a single poster.

items.question: How does the three-panel layout work?
items.answer: The poster is divided into three sections: top (50%) shows the origin story or source scene, middle (20%) displays a social media interface with your brand, and bottom (30%) features the customer experience or product enjoyment.

items.question: What AI model powers this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for generating the three-panel creative poster with consistent styling and seamless scene transitions.

items.question: Can I customize the brand elements?
items.answer: Yes, you can specify your brand name, messaging, product details, and scene descriptions. The AI generates custom logos and integrates your brand identity throughout the poster.

items.question: What industries is this best for?
items.answer: The workflow excels for food & beverage, fashion, lifestyle, and consumer goods brands. Any brand with a compelling origin-to-customer story can benefit from this format.

items.question: Does it include social media UI elements?
items.answer: Yes, the middle panel includes realistic social media interface elements: profile picture, username, post text, and engagement metrics—creating an authentic social media aesthetic.

items.question: What output formats are available?
items.answer: The workflow generates high-resolution images in 3:4 aspect ratio, optimized for social media posts, stories, and digital advertising platforms.

items.question: Can characters span across panels?
items.answer: Yes, the workflow can create characters that cross panel boundaries—like a farmer reaching from the origin scene into the customer scene—creating visual continuity and storytelling impact.
